name: Mimikatz Activity Detected
description: Detects indicators of Mimikatz or similar credential dumping tools
query:
// Mimikatz Detection
// Known Mimikatz indicators
events from endpoint
where command_line contains "sekurlsa" or command_line contains "kerberos::list"
  or command_line contains "lsadump" or command_line contains "privilege::debug"
  or process_name contains "mimikatz"
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
